content: Remote OK Venture Lending Associate Banco Covalto &lt;p&gt;&lt;span&gt;Covalto is seeking a Senior Associate to join the Global Venture Lending team. This is a highly technical role focused on the analysis, structuring, and management of complex credit investments across the Americas. You will act as a key execution lead for the platform, responsible for driving deals from initial due diligence through to closing and portfolio monitoring.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&lt;p&gt;&lt;span&gt;In the short term, you will manage one direct report and assist the Managing Director in scaling the team by hiring and onboarding additional resources.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&lt;p&gt;&lt;span&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Key Responsibilities&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&lt;ul&gt;&lt;li&gt;&lt;p&gt;&lt;span&gt;Deal Execution: Lead the development and rigorous review of financial and credit models, including detailed cash flow forecasting, scenario analysis, and stress testing.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&lt;li&gt;&lt;p&gt;&lt;span&gt;Due Diligence: Coordinate comprehensive due diligence processes, interfacing directly with management teams and venture sponsors to evaluate business models and creditworthiness.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&lt;li&gt;&lt;p&gt;&lt;span&gt;Structuring: Design and analyze transaction structures, including collateral packages, restrictive covenants, and risk mitigation strategies tailored to high-growth companies.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&lt;li&gt;&lt;p&gt;&lt;span&gt;Investment Committee: Prepare and present high-conviction investment memorandums and credit papers to the Investment Committee.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&lt;li&gt;&lt;p&gt;&lt;span&gt;Legal &amp;amp; Closing: Support the negotiation of legal documentation and the execution of transactions, collaborating closely with internal and external counsel.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&lt;li&gt;&lt;p&gt;&lt;span&gt;Portfolio Management: Oversee portfolio health, monitor covenant compliance, and evaluate ongoing performance against the original investment thesis.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&lt;li&gt;&lt;p&gt;&lt;span&gt;Team Leadership: Supervise and mentor junior analysts, ensuring high standards of technical output and supporting the recruitment of new team members.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&lt;/ul&gt;&lt;p&gt;&lt;span&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Qualifications&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&lt;ul&gt;&lt;li&gt;&lt;p&gt;&lt;span&gt;Experience: 4â7 years of experience in Venture Debt, Structured Finance, Private Credit, or a related technical lending field.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&lt;li&gt;&lt;p&gt;&lt;span&gt;Technical Skills: Advanced proficiency in financial modeling and data analysis.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&lt;li&gt;&lt;p&gt;&lt;span&gt;Ecosystem Knowledge: Strong understanding of the venture capital lifecycle and credit dynamics within the technology and fintech sectors.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&lt;li&gt;&lt;p&gt;&lt;span&gt;Languages: Native or professional fluency in both English and Spanish is required.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&lt;li&gt;&lt;p&gt;&lt;span&gt;Education: Bachelorâs degree in Finance, Economics, or a related field; CFA or advanced degree preferred.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&lt;/ul&gt;&lt;p&gt;&lt;span&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Position Details&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&lt;ul&gt;&lt;li&gt;&lt;p&gt;&lt;span&gt;Reporting: Reports to the Managing Director, Global Venture Lending.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&lt;li&gt;&lt;p&gt;&lt;span&gt;Location: TBD (Mexico City or Remote Colombia).&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&lt;li&gt;&lt;p&gt;&lt;span&gt;Attributes: We are looking for a proactive &quot;business owner&quot; who operates with technical precision, humility, and a results-oriented mindset.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&lt;/ul&gt; design, technical, customer support 2026-06-04T14:00:12+00:00 1132815 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-venture-lending-associate-banco-covalto-1132815 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Art Director Maker Lab <p>Grounded in a talent-centric mindset, Maker Lab is a marketing agency designed to build decentralised technology-led agency teams, rooted in collaboration with clients from the ground up. Maker Labâs cross-functional teams of multidisciplinary specialists are embedded into client teams across digital marketing competencies â from measurement &amp; analytics to content production.</p><p></p><p>Job Summary:</p><p>We're looking for a culturally tuned Art Director to elevate social-first campaigns for a leading QSR brand. This role blends insight-led thinking and hands-on execution, turning briefs into engaging ideas shaped by culture, trends, and audience behaviour across platforms.</p><p></p><p>Please share your creative portfolio to be considered for this position.</p><p></p><p>Role:</p><ul><li>Contribute to campaign ideation and support the development of social-first creative concepts across always-on content, campaigns, and activations.</li><li>Translate ideas into strong visual directions, key visuals, layouts, and content assets across digital platforms.</li><li>Collaborate with copywriters, social strategists, and cross-functional teams to develop integrated creative solutions.</li><li>Create and adapt visual assets for social, digital, CRM, and occasional offline touchpoints.</li><li>Stay tuned into social trends, internet culture, and platform behaviours to inspire relevant creative work.</li><li>Ensure creative outputs are aligned to brand guidelines while supporting the evolution of brand expression.</li><li>Support the execution of campaigns from concept through to delivery, ensuring consistency and quality.</li><li>Work closely with stakeholders to interpret briefs and refine creative outputs based on feedback.</li><li>Manage multiple tasks and deadlines while maintaining attention to detail and craft quality.</li><li>Support internal reviews and quality checks to ensure all deliverables meet creative standards.</li></ul><p></p><p>You:</p><ul><li>BA/BS degree or equivalent experience</li><li>5+ years of experience in an Art Director, Designer, or Social Creative role.</li><li>A strong portfolio demonstrating integrated campaign thinking, social-first creativity and high-quality visual execution.</li><li>Deep understanding of social platforms, digital culture and audience behaviour.</li><li>Able to move seamlessly between strategic thinking, creative ideation and hands-on execution.</li><li>Strong visual storytelling skills with the ability to bring ideas to life across multiple formats and touchpoints.</li&gt
